tafkeer.title: Tafkeer
tafkeer.description: Arabic-first AI SaaS platform with multi-model inference (59 models via OpenRouter). Mobile-first with React Native, tRPC on AWS EKS, and Stripe billing. Live in production.

luqman.title: Luqman
luqman.description: Deep learning trading intelligence using a hybrid LSTM/GRU/CNN architecture with temporal attention mechanisms for time-series market prediction.

netro.title: Netro
